factors.rationale: The product is the single dominant focal point and fills enough of the frame to identify instantly.
The product is isolated with no useful context or only a generic marketplace presentation.
The image does not make a benefit legible.
The eye path is obvious, text is readable, and supporting elements do not distract.
The product is clear enough, but material quality is not emphasized.
Brand name is prominently displayed, providing a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and sharp subject boundaries make the creative readable.
